mapper.sql: id, post_id, user_id, parent_reply_id, content, status, created_at, updated_at

SELECT r.id, r.post_id, p.status AS post_status, b.status AS board_status, r.user_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username) AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar, u.role AS author_role, r.parent_reply_id, CASE WHEN r.parent_reply_id IS NOT NULL AND (pr.id IS NULL OR pr.status = 0) THEN '已移除' ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(pu.nickname, ''), pu.username) END AS parent_author_name, CASE WHEN r.parent_reply_id IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN pr.id IS NULL OR pr.status = 0 THEN '该评论已移除' WHEN length(pr.content) > 80 THEN substring(pr.content from 1 for 80) || '...' ELSE pr.content END AS parent_content_preview, r.content, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM replies r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id JOIN posts p ON p.id = r.post_id JOIN boards b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN replies pr ON pr.id = r.parent_reply_id LEFT JOIN users pu ON pu.id = pr.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO replies (post_id, user_id, parent_reply_id, content, status) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentReplyId}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1))
mapper.select: WHERE r.post_id = #{postId} AND r.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND b.status = 1 ORDER BY r.created_at ASC, r.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE replies SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM replies r USING posts p WHERE r.post_id = p.id AND p.board_id = #{boardId}
